name_en: Bottega Veneta collector-grade mini-weave is truly the best!! Bottega Veneta's most classic mini woven handbag is back!! We used the highest quality leather paired with top-tier craftsmanship ❤️ to create the most precious works. We pioneered the Intrecciato leather weaving technique ❤️. This unique traditional exclusive leather weaving method has not only become our signature but also embodies the time-consuming craftsmanship of our products ❤️. The brand new TOSCA handbag is definitely a selected piece worth collecting 🆕
